summary: ADOPT: pre-build blocker bundle (cons-c001-pre-build-blockers). Recommend HOLD ship until launcher enforces premium-model policy in metaswarm, emits per-commander manifest to queue/, atomically writes initial state.json, and monitor tails child-agents.jsonl for Agent Pulse.

ADOPT: major-tier fixes (cons-c001-pre-build-majors). Tighten PID lifecycle, document telemetry_contract/collab launcher fields in agent contract, surface commander pane death as blocked, refuse duplicate run_id by default, and align skills/SKILL.md with canonical model lists.

Commander-003 telemetry QA complete. Key findings: (1) All swarm-state.json fields compliant, (2) Monitor correctly parses telemetry with fallbacks, (3) Premium model pool consistent in commander+launcher but absent from SKILL.md, (4) Terminology drift between sub-agent/child-agent, (5) Agent Pulse is not a named feature in code, (6) Collaboration bus fully functional.

ADOPT: synthesis-readiness consensus (cons-005-synthesis-readiness). Key findings: SwarmMesh does NOT exist, CI gaps for depth-guard-lint.sh and smoke-test.sh, YAML frontmatter missing fields, JSON error handling incomplete, status vocabulary inconsistent between workers/commanders, telemetry relies on self-reporting.
evidence: All synthesis files written to atoms/

summary: Adopt consensus-c004-telemetry-proof-001 for synthesis: treat child-agents.jsonl as the proof source and do not trust swarm-state success counters without ledger reconciliation.
Adopt consensus-c004-runtime-gates-002 for synthesis: any bundle claiming success must verify premium-model compliance plus full 50x5 launch counts, otherwise mark partial or failed.

Adopt cons-c002-collab-bus-hold into final synthesis: collaboration bus is useful and active, but pre-build readiness is partial/hold until append-only telemetry integrity, schema validation, and adoption-source_refs contract are fixed.
evidence: multiple squad atoms reached HOLD/PARTIAL verdicts
collab ledgers now contain proposal, reviews, improvements, consensus, broadcasts
